0.2.0-alpha.description:
Recent Changes
- Custom Shard Counts or pre-calculated shard count up to player choice
- Now it's progressive map shard that goes towards a new map in a queue
- Lines are now unlocked one by one
- Early logic is now implemented better. I hope.
- a new stylized skip button

Bug Fixes
- Fixed UI issues on level-up
- Fixed Week progression checks being out of sync with weeks
- Fixed sending death link on leaving a map / disconnecting
- Fixed checks sometimes not processing.
0.2.0-alpha.title: Mini Metro Archipelago v0.2.0-alpha

alpha.description:
This is an early alpha release intended primarily for testing and feedback.
Expect bugs and incomplete features!
Please report bugs to the developers

You can find the set-up guide in the Github's [README.md.](https://github.com/Slimm160/Mini-Metro-Archipelago/blob/main/README.md)

Choo Choo!
